videos.title: The Monoski is Alive & Well in Wyoming | Season Pass
videos.description: Once a year, the entire monoski community come together to celebrate an obscure form of snow travel, the monoski. Rachael Burks joins tens of monoski enthusiasts in Jackson Hole for Monopalooza.
videos.transcript:
So this is the 17th annual monopola.
Mono skiing may have reached the peak of
its popularity decades ago, but there is
still a rowdy group that gathers once a
year at Mono Palooa.
This year they're bringing the party to
Jackson. And where there's a party,
there's Rachel Burks. Rachel made her
name as a big mountain skier, but deep
inside there's a mono skier just itching
to bust out. I've been mono skiing twice
before. Mon is a rad sport, but there
really aren't that many people that do
it. And so this is an opportunity for
all the lone wolves to get together and
run as a pack.
[Music]
Corbett's koir might be the most famous
run in the US. Or maybe infamous would
be more accurate. It's a run that's hard
enough to tackle on a pair of skis, let
alone one.
I'm sure there are rumors spreading like
wildfire all over Jackson Hole about the
mono skiers that jumped into Corbett's
Kool-Air.
It's pretty impressive. It's kind of an
iconic drop into a cool.
Lee made it look super super smooth and
easy. And then it's Scotty Crown's
birthday today and he's like, "But I'm
going to Jackson.
I'm checking that off the bucket list.
I'm jumping in the cor.
He was so pumped we didn't have the
heart to tell him that that's not really
jumping.
You've probably heard of a pub crawl.
Well, these guys are taking that concept
to ski areas across the Tetons. Their
next stop is White Pine where you can
actually rent out the entire mountain
for a day. The mountain is open for mono
pollution.
[Applause]
Ladies and gentlemen, start your
engines.
Bound by love.
Mono skiing is tough to teach kids
because you can't pizza and you can't
French fry. And unless you really know
what you're doing, you can't stop.
Yeah. I never knew they made a love like
this. Never had a view from up above
like this. It happened so quick. I think
it was I started doing this when I was
in high school. I've never looked back.
We can go a whole year and not see
another monosphere except for this
weekend.
Swift and all them haters throwing shade
just mad cuz we lit.

videos.title: World's best cross-country skiers gather at Stifel Loppet Cup
videos.description:
The Stifel Loppet Cup is the first World Cup cross-country race to be held on U.S. soil in more than 20 years.

I wanted to wrap up the season in style and what better way to that than to sign up for the longest ski race in the world.
